title: FINANCIAL LITERACY CLASSES - 211info
text: PEOPLE'S COLLECTIVE COMMUNITY CENTER FINANCIAL LITERACY CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial literacy classes. Business mentoring, including culturally sensitive supportive service and access to start-up grants, is available. Child care is available if requested. 1695 Jefferson Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted but with a focus on the African-American community Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 868-6337 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 868-6337 Michelle Hjelm [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of Jefferson Street and 17th Avenue Services: Business Development * African American Community Financial Literacy Training * African American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD FOR THE SOUL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PEOPLE'S COLLECTIVE COMMUNITY CENTER
